allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from google.adk.agents import Agent; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(Agent\); print\(src[3000:5000]\)")

Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from google.adk.agents import BaseAgent; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(BaseAgent\); print\([line for line in src.split\(''\\n''\) if ''sub_agent'' in line.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from apps.root_app.agent import root_agent; print\(''OK:'', root_agent.name\); print\(''sub_agents:'', [a.name for a in root_agent.sub_agents]\)")
